title: Place for deposit; custodian
doc_html:
§54.  Place for deposit; custodian

The records shall be deposited and kept in a fire proof vault or room, provided by the register of the state land office, who may appoint a custodian thereof, under his control.
doc_text:
§54.  Place for deposit; custodian
The records shall be deposited and kept in a fire proof vault or room, provided by the register of the state land office, who may appoint a custodian thereof, under his control.
